summary: Read-only GPU telemetry via nvidia-smi CSV query. No deps — shells out directly. Gracefully handles missing binary (returns failed with hint, never crashes). Destructive kill-gpu-process lives in the terminal adapter.

commands.summary: Enumerate GPUs with index, name, uuid, total memory, driver.
Per-GPU live metrics: utilization, memory used/total, temp, power draw.
Compute processes on GPUs: pid, process name, GPU uuid, used memory.
Return the installed NVIDIA driver version.
